one_time_description: Ahtahkakoop Treaty Land Entitlement Settlement recognized as revenue, partially offset by contribution to Ahtahkakoop Treaty Land Entitlement Trust of $42,145,804
economic_notes: ACDLP operates two convenience stores, a cafe, a tire shop and a canteen. COVID-19 impacted operations with increased pandemic expenditures and decreased BATC Community Development Corporation and First Nations Trust funding due to SIGA casino closures.
notes: Large one-time TLE settlement of $43,275,501 recognized in revenue with offsetting contribution of $42,145,804 to Ahtahkakoop Treaty Land Entitlement Trust (not consolidated as Council does not control it). Net impact ~$1,129,697. Cows and Plows Treaty Benefit Claim ongoing as contingent asset. ACDLP (99.99% owned) accounted for by modified equity method as a GBE. Province is Saskatchewan (SK), not AB. Emphasis of matter paragraph in auditor's report regarding the Cows and Plows claim loan and insurance.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
High ISC dependency (89.93%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
